items.title: Server-rendered bundles make briefing pages repeatable
items.summary: Reviewed Structured Synthesis feeds an Artifact Definition Bundle that api stores and the public viewer renders.
items.content_text: The workflow accepts reviewed structured inputs, submits an Artifact Definition Bundle, and keeps source citations available through the server-rendered viewer. The skill must not write a complete local HTML artifact.

items.title: Audio Briefs move through script before server rendering
items.summary: Audio Brief generation requires a reviewed Show Script before submitting a server-rendered definition.
items.content_text: The recommended path is Structured Synthesis, Synthesis Review, Show Script, Script Review, then server-rendered Artifact Definition submission. The Skill must not create local segment manifests or local audio files.

items.title: Behavior evals should replay independent agent runs
items.summary: Skill behavior evals are most useful when a fresh agent follows the installed skill and produces traceable artifacts.
items.content_text: Golden traces are useful references, but the acceptance signal comes from a new independent agent run graded against an expected output contract.
